message:
test(fcp-core): pin capability classifier serde tag matrix (flywheel_connectors-282xa)

Bead asks for CapabilityType serde tag JSON+CBOR roundtrip. fcp-core
has no type literally named CapabilityType. The capability surface
has three classifier enums each with #[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]:
SafetyTier (5 variants — primary CapabilityType analogue, wired into
OperationMeta.safety_tier and ToolDescriptor.safety_tier), RiskLevel
(4 variants), IdempotencyClass (3 variants). Operator dashboards and
audit-log filters consume all three sets of tokens — pinning the
matrix prevents silent drift in any of them.

Coverage:
- SafetyTier: per-variant JSON form (safe/risky/dangerous/critical/
  forbidden), JSON + CBOR round-trip, CBOR encodes as Text (not
  integer/array — cross-language consumers dispatch on string),
  PascalCase + unknown rejection, pairwise distinctness, count = 5
- RiskLevel: per-variant JSON form (low/medium/high/critical), JSON
  + CBOR round-trip, PascalCase rejection
- RiskLevel::Critical and SafetyTier::Critical share the "critical"
  token — pinned as intentional collision (each in its own field)
- IdempotencyClass: per-variant JSON form (none/best_effort/strict),
  JSON + CBOR round-trip, BestEffort uses underscore not hyphen,
  PascalCase + kebab-case rejection
- IdempotencyClass::None token does NOT alias serde null (explicit
  "none" string is required)
- Cross-enum: every classifier token is snake_case lowercase ASCII,
  no leading/trailing/double underscore, non-empty

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
